message:
feat: auto-route ChatGPT OAuth to correct endpoint

Detect JWT tokens in Authorization header and automatically route
to chatgpt.com/backend-api/codex instead of api.openai.com.

This means users only need to set OPENAI_BASE_URL to the proxy -
the proxy will auto-detect OAuth vs API key auth and route correctly:
- sk-* tokens → api.openai.com/v1/responses
- JWT tokens → chatgpt.com/backend-api/codex/v1/responses

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
